stemHtml: What flight time must an applicant for an aerobatic rating have completed?

options.a: At least 30 hours as PIC in aeroplanes or TMGs.
options.b: At least 30 hours as PIC and 50 take-offs and landings in aeroplanes.
options.c: At least 40 hours as PIC in aeroplanes or TMGs.
options.d: At least 40 hours as PIC and 60 take-offs and landings in aeroplanes.
